title: potamogeton lucens var. alpinus
intro: Potamogeton lucens var. alpinus, also known as Alpine Frogbit, is a variety of aquatic plant belonging to the family Potamogetonaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema. Alpine Frogbit has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antispasmodic. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, with the fresh leaves being the most commonly used part for herbal preparations.
